CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id COMMENT 'Initial comment';
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Updated comment';
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Comment with special characters: !@#$%^&*()';
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Comment with a new line\n and tab\t characters.';

ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Comment with an extremely long text exceeding normal length, to test the boundary condition for the comment field. This comment should contain enough details to thoroughly assess how ClickHouse handles long comments beyond typical use cases and should consider character limits imposed by the database.';

CREATE TABLE replicated_table ON CLUSTER 'test_cluster' (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{layer}-{shard}/replicated_table', '{replica}') ORDER BY id COMMENT 'Replicated table comment';
ALTER TABLE replicated_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Different comment for replica';
ALTER TABLE replicated_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Another comment for testing purposes.';
ALTER TABLE replicated_table MODIFY COMMENT NULL;
ALTER TABLE replicated_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Comment for a table with a more complex name: test_table_complex_name_123!';
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id COMMENT 'Another table comment';
ALTER TABLE another_table MODIFY COMMENT 'Changing another table comment';
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name='Alice');
